llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 11.5 was pulled from consent agenda because it was duplicated as an action item (12.1). Item 12.5 (Board Policy 5116.1 - Intradistrict Open Enrollment) was not voted on; no action taken per board policy committee recommendation to postpone.
